articles.title: Iran threatens to block more trade routes as US launches fresh strikes

articles.title: Three killed as Russian bombing of Odesa continues

articles.summary: 国内需要の低迷とイラン戦争による原油価格の影響が、中国の堅調な輸出を上回り、経済成長が目標を下回る結果となった。

articles.title: Seven Britons among those killed in Spain wildfires

articles.summary: スペイン当局は火曜日、山火事による13名の犠牲者のうち12名が外国人であり、その中に英国人7名が含まれると発表した。

articles.title: Boss of fake government agency arrested in Nigeria after weeks on the run

articles.title: Ukraine and EU agree joint drone production deal as Ursula von der Leyen visits Kyiv. Follow DW
articles.description: Ukraine and the EU have agreed on a drone deal combining Kyiv’s know-how with the bloc's scale-up power. Meanwhile, Russian attacks caused more fatalities in Odesa as Moscow increasingly targets the port. DW has more.

articles.title: England vs. Argentina: A football rivalry full of history

articles.title: San Francisco: 1 dead, 3 missing in Alcatraz boat sinking

articles.title: Running dry: How to store more groundwater for dry seasons
articles.description: More frequent weather extremes are leading to water shortages during droughts, and flooding during heavy rain. But groundwater storage can help secure water for dry seasons while mitigating extreme rain.

articles.summary: 気象の極端化が干ばつによる水不足と豪雨による洪水を引き起こす中、地下水貯蔵が乾季の水の確保と豪雨緩和に役立つ。

articles.title: Why investors are suddenly fleeing Indonesia
articles.description: Indonesia, one of Asia's biggest economies, risks losing its emerging-market status as President Prabowo Subianto's spending plans rattle investors. Will the man who promised to deliver 8% growth rein in his ambitions?

articles.title: India news: Landmark trade deal with UK takes effect

articles.title: Volodymyr Zelenskyy pushes for new government in Ukraine

articles.title: 150 years of the Bayreuth Festival: Confronting a troubled legacy
articles.description: Should the past be confronted — or avoided? Why the Wagner festival's handling of its Nazi-era legacy remains a contentious issue in its 150th anniversary year.
articles.titleJa: バイロイト音楽祭150周年：困難な遺産との対峙
articles.summary: ワーグナー音楽祭が150周年を迎える中、ナチス時代の遺産への対処が依然として物議を醸しており、過去と向き合うか避けるべきか問われている。

articles.title: Border controls scrapped between Spain and Gibraltar
articles.description: As the end of border controls took effect, the old chain-link fence between Spain and Gibraltar was taken down. This historic decision allows for greater freedom of movement for people and goods.
articles.titleJa: スペインとジブラルタルの国境管理が廃止
articles.summary: スペインとジブラルタルの間の国境管理が撤廃され、古い有刺鉄線フェンスが撤去された。これは人々と物の移動の自由を拡大する歴史的な決定である。

articles.title: New US Ebola patient arrives in Germany for treatment
articles.description:
Aid worker flown to Berlin as Trump administration bars Americans from traveling to US on commercial flights
A US national who contracted Ebola in the Democratic Republic of the Congo has arrived in Germany for treatment, the health ministry in Berlin said on Monday, weeks after another American infected with Ebola in the DRC was treated in Berlin.
Meanwhile, the Trump administration on Monday said it was blocking American citizens in ⁠the DRC from traveling to the US on commercial flights, Reuters reported, citing a White House official.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 米国人エボラ患者が治療のためドイツに到着
articles.summary: 米国人がコンゴ民主共和国でエボラに感染し、治療のためドイツに搬送された。一方、米国は感染国からの自国民の商業便での帰国を一時禁止した。

articles.title: Killings continue on Del Monte farm in Kenya, families say, after G4S hired for security
articles.description:
Exclusive: Three men killed in incidents over past year allegedly involving G4S guards, who replaced in-house team after previous deaths
Bereaved families and politicians have raised alarm about continued killings on Del Monte’s pineapple farm in Kenya despite the company hiring a British security firm to replace its in-house security team after previous deaths were exposed by the Guardian.
The multinational food company appointed G4S to guard the farm, which is estimated to cover at least 40 sq km, the area of a small city, after the Guardian detailed allegations of brutal assaults and killings of people suspected of trespassing on its land. Kenyan police have been working with G4S to guard the site.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: G4Sが警備を担当した後も、ケニアのデルモンテ農場で殺害が続いていると遺族が主張
articles.summary: ケニアのデルモンテ農場で、G4Sが警備を引き継いだ後も殺人が続いていると遺族が訴えている。警備員によるものとされる事件で、過去1年間に3人が死亡した。

articles.title: First patients enrolled in record-breaking Ebola treatment trial in DRC
articles.description:
Two drugs are being trialled in the Ituri region in a programme set up just six weeks after the outbreak was declared, with hopes it will reduce mortality rates
There is no approved drug to help the medical teams scrabbling to save lives in the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo – but there are hopes that could change within months as the first patients are enrolled in a treatment trial.
It is a record pace to set up and start this kind of research, scientists said, with patients enrolled just six weeks after the outbreak being declared a public health emergency of international concern by the World Health Organization (WHO) on 17 May.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: コンゴ民主共和国でエボラ治療薬の記録的な臨床試験が開始、初の患者が登録
articles.summary: コンゴ民主共和国でエボラ治療薬の臨床試験が過去最速で開始され、最初の患者が登録された。これにより死亡率の低下が期待されている。

articles.title: Nigeria says army has killed 300 bandits in north-western state of Zamfara
articles.description:
Vigilantes also took part in the fight that raged all night and the following morning, residents say
Nigerian soldiers killed more than 300 members of kidnapping and cattle bandit gangs in the north-western state of Zamfara this week, according to a government official.
Government troops targeted the gangs in Gummi district in a two-day operation that “led to the elimination of more than 300 terrorists”, Zamfara’s information commissioner, Mahmud Muhammad Dantawasa, said in a statement.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ナイジェリア軍が北西部ザムファラ州で300人の武装集団を殺害と発表
articles.summary: ナイジェリア政府は、北西部ザムファラ州で軍が身代金誘拐や牛泥棒の武装集団300人以上を殺害したと発表した。

articles.title: Developing countries spend more repaying foreign debt than on education, UN reveals
articles.description:
Unesco report shows children lost out to servicing debt in 113 countries, with 18 spending five times more on loans
Most developing countries spent less on education than they did repaying debt last year, according to the UN, at the same time as global aid to education is predicted to decline by up to 30%.
More was spent on servicing foreign debt than on education in 113 developing countries in 2025, according to research by the UN’s culture and education agency, Unesco. In sub-Saharan Africa, countries spent 3.6 times more on debt than education.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Shipwrecks of Shackleton and Scott recreated in 3D digital form after deep sea expedition
articles.description:
Canadian scientists visit remains of polar exploration vessels in ‘golden era for shipwreck investigating’
Moments after devouring the final glimmers of light, the seafloor offered nothing but darkness and silt. Then the bow appeared.
More than 1,000ft (305 metres) below the surface of the Labrador Sea, off the coast of Canada, the skeleton of the final ship used by the famed polar explorer Ernest Shackleton appeared in its silty grave.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: シャクルトンとスコットの難破船が深海探査後、3Dデジタルで再現される
articles.summary: カナダの科学者チームが深海探査でシャクルトンとスコットの難破船を発見し、その残骸が3Dデジタルで再現された。これは深海調査の「黄金時代」における重要な発見。

articles.title: Derision at US chain Chipotle’s plan to sell its Mexican food in Mexico
articles.description:
One social media user described the opening of its first outlet in Monterrey as ‘like the dog teaching a duck to fly’
A US chain’s plan to sell its version of Mexican food to Mexicans with a first branch south of the border has prompted bemusement, skepticism and anger among local people.
Chipotle Mexican Grill, known for its customisable burritos, tacos and bowls, has more than 4,000 locations worldwide and announced on Tuesday that it was expanding into Mexico in what it described as a significant milestone.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: ‘God is punishing the politicians’: anger at earthquake response grows in Venezuela
articles.description:
Threat of social unrest rises as public indignation at lack of disaster aid comes on top of fallout from US military intervention
• A revolution in ruins: fury amid the rubble of a housing project in quake-hit Venezuela
Public anger at what many perceive as the Venezuelan government’s botched response to twin earthquakes that killed nearly 4,500 people is growing, with one grieving mother caught on camera berating the son of former president Nicolás Maduro.
Maduro’s politician son received a hostile reception while visiting a semi-destroyed social housing project named after his father’s late mentor Hugo Chávez.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 「神が政治家を罰している」：ベネズエラで地震対応への怒りが高まる
articles.summary: ベネズエラで発生した2度の地震後、政府の対応の遅れに対する国民の怒りが高まっている。約4,500人が死亡し、マドゥロ前大統領の息子が被災地で罵倒される場面も。

articles.title: Mexico to demand criminal complaints over migrants killed by ICE in US
articles.description:
Claudia Sheinbaum says Mexicans ‘outraged’ over killing last week of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo by agents in Houston
Claudia Sheinbaum announced on Monday that Mexico would be demanding criminal complaints in the US for the deaths of more than a dozen Mexican migrants in immigration detention and those killed in anti-migrant operations.
The deaths include last week’s killing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo in Houston, whom Sheinbaum said was “practically murdered”.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: メキシコ、米国ICEによる移民殺害で刑事告訴を要求へ
articles.summary: メキシコは、米国で入国管理執行局（ICE）によって殺害されたメキシコ人移民に関する刑事告訴を米国に要求すると発表した。ヒューストンでの殺害事件などが含まれる。

articles.title: Experts warn of ways screwworm could spread in the US and new difficulties in keeping it at bay
articles.description:
Scientists worry that current eradication efforts won’t be able to contain parasitic infestation pushing into US
When conservationists set up cameras in remote regions of Central American forests, they wanted to monitor illegal cattle movement, which can lead to deforestation. But in recent months, they discovered another alarming development: wildlife rapidly infected with the new world screwworm.
It’s a warning sign of how the fly could spread in the US – and it signals new difficulties in pushing it back south, a process that will probably take years, experts say.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 「スクリューワーム」が米国に広がる可能性と対策の新たな困難について専門家が警告
articles.summary: 専門家は、新世界スクリューワームが米国に侵入し広がる可能性と、その駆除の困難さについて警告している。中央アメリカからの寄生虫が野生生物を急速に感染させている。

articles.title: Gibraltar border controls lifted: Is it part of Schengen, the UK – or both?
articles.description: A new treaty signed by Britain and the EU includes the removal of border checks between Spain and Gibraltar.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup brackets: Teams, predictions, schedule and road to the final

articles.title: Crowds cross between Spain and Gibraltar following UK-EU treaty
articles.description: A large crowd crossed between Spain and Gibraltar in the early hours of Wednesday morning, celebrating the UK-EU treaty.
articles.titleJa: 英国・EU条約後、スペインとジブラルタルの間で群衆が越境
articles.summary: 英国とEUの条約締結後、水曜日の未明に群衆がスペインとジブラルタルの国境を越え、条約成立を祝った。国境管理解除の具体的な影響を示す。

articles.title: ‘A role model’: Djed Spence, first Muslim England player, lifts hopes
articles.description: Britain swells with pride over the 25-year-old, the first Muslim to wear the England jersey at a FIFA World Cup.
articles.titleJa: 「ロールモデル」：初のイスラム教徒イングランド代表選手、ジェド・スペンスが希望をもたらす
articles.summary: FIFAワールドカップでイングランド初のイスラム教徒選手ジェド・スペンスが、英国の人々に誇りと希望をもたらし、ロールモデルとして注目。

articles.title: Bangkok pub fire toll rises to 32 with 15 in intensive care
articles.description: Officials confirm two more deaths as 30 people remain in hospital, including 15 in intensive care units.
articles.titleJa: バンコクのパブ火災、死者32人に増加、15人が集中治療室に
articles.summary: バンコクのパブ火災で死者数が32人に増加。30人が入院中、うち15人が集中治療室で手当てを受けていることが当局により確認された。

articles.title: Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani and Al Jazeera
articles.description: A tribute to the late Father Emir from Al Jazeera's Chairman of Board of Directors Sheikh Hamad bin Thamer Al Thani.
articles.titleJa: ハマド・ビン・ハリーファ・アール・サーニーとアルジャジーラ
articles.summary: アルジャジーラ取締役会会長ハマド・ビン・サーメル・アール・サーニーが、故ハーマド・ビン・ハリーファ・アール・サーニー前首長への追悼の意を表した記事。

articles.title: Iran launches attacks across region as US strikes continue
articles.description: Iran attacked Kuwait, Bahrain, and Jordan on Tuesday night, claiming to destroy the US Fifth Fleet’s command centre.
articles.titleJa: 米国の攻撃が続く中、イランが地域全体で攻撃を開始
articles.summary: イランは火曜日の夜、クウェート、バーレーン、ヨルダンを攻撃し、米第五艦隊司令部を破壊したと主張。米国の攻撃も続き、地域の緊張が高まる。

articles.title: Russian attack on Odesa kills three as Ukraine targets vessels in Black Sea
articles.description: At least three people killed and three others wounded in Russian strikes on Odesa, city's military administrator says.
articles.titleJa: ロシアのオデーサ攻撃で3人死亡、ウクライナは黒海の船舶を標的

articles.title: US resumes Iran ports blockade as Gulf attacks continue: What’s the latest?
articles.description: Less than a month after signing an MoU as a step towards peace, the US reinstates a naval blockade on Iranian ports.
articles.titleJa: 湾岸攻撃が続く中、米国がイラン港封鎖を再開：最新情報
articles.summary: 平和への一歩として覚書署名後、1ヶ月足らずで米国がイラン港への海軍封鎖を再開。湾岸地域での攻撃が続き、緊張が再燃している。

articles.title: Watch FIFA World Cup: Spain defeats France to reach final
articles.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

articles.summary: FIFAワールドカップ2026北米大会の最新試合ハイライト、反応、プレビュー。スペインがフランスを破って決勝に進出した。

articles.title: Trump threatens to bomb bridges and power plants unless Iran resumes talks
articles.description: Trump's comments aired as the two countries exchanged fire for the fourth day in a row and the US resumed blockading Iranian ports.
articles.titleJa: トランプ大統領、イランが協議再開しなければ橋や発電所を爆撃すると威嚇
articles.summary: トランプ大統領は、イランが協議を再開しない場合、橋や発電所を爆撃すると威嚇。両国は4日連続で交戦し、米国はイランの港湾封鎖を再開した。

articles.description: Guillem Balague examines how the Argentina squad is built around Lionel Messi as they prepare to play against England in the World Cup semi-finals.
articles.titleJa: 仲間、マテ茶、自由 ― アルゼンチンはいかにメッシを最大限に活かしたか
articles.summary: ワールドカップ準決勝を控えるアルゼンチン代表が、いかにリオネル・メッシを中心にチームを構築しているかを分析。

articles.title: We shouldn't confuse politics and football - Scaloni
articles.description: Argentina manager Lionel Scaloni says he is "not going to mix" football and politics before his side's World Cup semi-final against England.
articles.titleJa: 政治とサッカーを混同すべきではない ― スカローニ監督
articles.summary: アルゼンチン代表のリビング・スカローニ監督が、ワールドカップ準決勝を前に、サッカーと政治を混同しないと発言。

articles.title: The 91-year-old Argentine journalist covering his 18th World Cup
articles.description: Enrique Macaya Marquez has covered every World Cup since 1958, where a 17-year-old Pele featured.
articles.titleJa: 91歳のアルゼンチン人ジャーナリスト、18回目のワールドカップ取材
articles.summary: 91歳のアルゼンチン人ジャーナリスト、エンリケ・マカヤ・マルケス氏が、1958年以来18回目のワールドカップを取材。

articles.title: Why Venezuela’s earthquakes were so devastating: Geology, vulnerability, and years of structural neglect
articles.description: The dual earthquakes revealed how geology, corruption, and a longstanding humanitarian emergency amplified destruction across La Guaira, Caracas and seven other Venezuelan cities.
articles.titleJa: ベネズエラの地震がなぜこれほど壊滅的だったのか：地質、脆弱性、そして長年の構造的放置
articles.summary: ベネズエラを襲った二つの地震は、地質、腐敗、長年の人道上の緊急事態が複合的に作用し、ラ・グアイラ、カラカスなど7都市に甚大な被害をもたらしたことを明らかにした。

articles.title: Follow the story: Local journalists, media and advocates covering Venezuela’s earthquakes
articles.description: From La Guaira to affected communities nationwide, these Venezuelan voices are documenting the disaster and helping people find reliable information.
articles.titleJa: 物語を追う：ベネズエラの地震を報道する地元ジャーナリスト、メディア、活動家たち
articles.summary: ラ・グアイラから全国の被災地まで、ベネズエラの声が災害を記録し、人々が信頼できる情報を見つけるのを支援している。

articles.title: In Brazil, initiatives in peripheral communities seek to expand environmental education
articles.description: Agência Mural spoke with four collectives that work with local people to mitigate the impacts of climate change and promote environmental education in their areas.
articles.titleJa: ブラジルでは、周辺地域のイニシアチブが環境教育の拡大を目指す
articles.summary: ブラジルの周辺地域で活動する4つの団体が、地元住民と協力して気候変動の影響を軽減し、環境教育を推進している。

articles.title: Citizens lead relief efforts after major twin quakes in Venezuela
articles.description: Efforts from volunteers and SaR teams had rescued least 6,000 people alive from stricken areas, according to June 30 numbers from the government.
articles.titleJa: ベネズエラで発生した大規模な双子地震の後、市民が救援活動を主導
articles.summary: ベネズエラでの大地震後、ボランティアと捜索救助チームが救援活動を主導し、6月末までに少なくとも6,000人が救助された。

articles.title: Colombia becomes the first Latin American country to ban female genital mutilation
articles.description: Colombia just prohibited female genital mutilation after approving a bill called “Girls Without Ablation.” It is a law born within the communities that needed it most.
articles.titleJa: コロンビア、中南米で初めて女性性器切除を禁止
articles.summary: コロンビアは「アブレーションのない少女たち」法案を可決し、中南米で初めて女性性器切除を禁止した。これは、最も必要とされたコミュニティから生まれた法律である。

articles.title: Selling identities: The commercialization of Mayan culture
articles.description: In this edition, we explore a narrative shared by Grupo Xcaret and the Gran Consejo Maya de Quintana Roo that presents Mayan symbols and identities as a trademark.
articles.titleJa: アイデンティティの販売：マヤ文化の商業化
articles.summary: 本記事では、Grupo Xcaretとキンタナ・ロー州マヤ大評議会がマヤのシンボルとアイデンティティを商標として提示する物語を探る。

articles.title: When surveillance becomes part of the landscape
articles.description: The advance of these technologies is not occurring as an exception. They are established silently, without public debate, without transparency and without people knowing the fate of their data
articles.titleJa: 監視が景観の一部となるとき
articles.summary: 監視技術の進歩は公の議論や透明性を欠いたまま静かに確立され、人々は自身のデータの行方を知らないままとなっている。

articles.title: Three years of Pride: Santiago Méndez’s visual archive of queer Venezuela
articles.description: An interview with Venezuelan visual artist and photographer Santiago Méndez, who has exhaustively documente queerness and Pride in Caracas for the last three years.
articles.titleJa: プライドの3年間：サンティアゴ・メンデスのクィア・ベネズエラの視覚アーカイブ
articles.summary: ベネズエラのビジュアルアーティスト、サンティアゴ・メンデスへのインタビュー。彼は過去3年間、カラカスにおけるクィアネスとプライドを詳細に記録してきた。

articles.title: Brazil’s former First Lady juggles Christian conservatism, cracks open the far right’s gender contradictions
articles.description: With a personable approach to politics and a pastoral tone to her speeches, Michelle Bolsonaro juggles the roles of being her imprisoned husband’s caretaker and a political figure wannabe
articles.titleJa: ブラジルの前ファーストレディ、キリスト教保守主義と極右のジェンダー矛盾を突き崩す
articles.summary: ミシェル・ボルソナロは、夫の世話役と政治家志望という役割を両立させ、親しみやすい政治アプローチと牧歌的な演説で、極右のジェンダー矛盾を露呈させている。

articles.title: The case of Shakira Galíndez highlights a growing crisis for trans Venezuelan asylum seekers in the U.S.
articles.description: Shakira Galíndez fled Venezuela due to her vulnerability as a trans woman. Today, she is in a men’s detention facility, exposed to further discrimination, violence and deportation.
articles.titleJa: シャキーラ・ガリンデス氏の事例が、米国におけるトランスジェンダーのベネズエラ人亡命申請者の危機を浮き彫りにする
articles.summary: シャキーラ・ガリンデス氏はトランスジェンダー女性としての脆弱性からベネズエラを逃れたが、現在米国の男性収容施設で差別、暴力、強制送還の危険に晒されている。

articles.title: Australian police reveal unseen photos 25 years after British backpacker murder
articles.description: Police hope the images could jog memories that will help them find the body of Peter Falconio.
articles.titleJa: オーストラリア警察、イギリス人バックパッカー殺害から25年後に未公開写真を公開
articles.summary: オーストラリア警察は、イギリス人バックパッカー殺害事件から25年を経て、未公開写真を公開。遺体発見に繋がる情報提供を呼びかけている。

articles.title: Identity of Sydney daycare worker facing 329 child abuse offences revealed
articles.description: Hamish Tait is accused of abusing 136 children at five childcare facilities over a 16-year period.
articles.titleJa: シドニーの保育士、児童虐待329件で起訴される人物の身元が明らかに
articles.summary: シドニーの保育士、ハミッシュ・テイトが16年間で136人の児童に対し329件の虐待を行ったとして起訴され、その身元が公開された。

articles.title: At least 28 killed, 25 critically injured after fire engulfs Bangkok bar
articles.description: Firefighters arrived at the scene in the Chatuchak district to find patrons running through flames to escape.
articles.titleJa: バンコクのバーで火災発生、少なくとも28人死亡、25人が重傷
articles.summary: バンコクのチャトゥチャック地区のバーで火災が発生し、少なくとも28人が死亡、25人が重傷を負った。客は炎の中を逃げ惑った。

articles.title: Watch: At the scene where Bangkok's deadly bar fire unfolded
articles.description: The BBC’s South East Asia correspondent visits the site where at least 27 people were killed during a bar fire in Thailand.
articles.titleJa: 視聴：バンコクの死者を出したバー火災の現場から
articles.summary: タイのバーで発生した火災で少なくとも27人が死亡した現場をBBC東南アジア特派員が訪れ、その状況を伝えた。

articles.title: Thailand PM visits aftermath of deadly Bangkok bar fire
articles.description: Footage shows the aftermath of a deadly fire at a Bangkok pub that broke out just after midnight local time on Monday.
articles.titleJa: タイ首相、バンコクの死者を出したバー火災の現場を訪問
articles.summary: タイ首相が、月曜深夜にバンコクのパブで発生した死者を出した火災の現場を訪問し、その後の状況を視察した。

articles.title: Heavy rains and flash floods in Bangladesh leave 51 dead
articles.description: Thousands have lost their homes as flash floods and landslides have hit large parts of the country.
articles.titleJa: バングラデシュ、豪雨と鉄砲水により51人死亡
articles.summary: バングラデシュで豪雨と鉄砲水が発生し、国土の広範囲が被災。51人が死亡し、数千人が家を失った。

articles.title: Indian tourists among 15 killed as speedboat capsizes in Vietnam
articles.description: Local media say 21 people were saved after the boat overturned in rough seas near an island in south Vietnam.
articles.titleJa: ベトナムで高速ボートが転覆、インド人観光客含む15人死亡
articles.summary: ベトナム南部沖の荒海で高速ボートが転覆し、インド人観光客を含む15人が死亡した。21人は救助された。

articles.title: 'There was no way out': Witnesses describe how deadly inferno swept through Bangkok bar
articles.description: A musician who was performing when the fire broke out says he crawled for the exit - and was thrown from the bar when something exploded.
articles.titleJa: 「逃げ場がなかった」：バンコクのバーで猛火が広がる様子を目撃者が語る
articles.summary: バンコクのバー火災で演奏中だったミュージシャンが、炎と爆発から命からがら逃げ出した状況を語った。

articles.title: How Indian scientists are mapping the brain's last frontier
articles.description: India's new brainstem atlas offers scientists an unprecedented map of one of the brain's least known regions.
articles.titleJa: インドの科学者たち、脳の最後のフロンティアをどのようにマッピングしているのか
articles.summary: インドが開発した新しい脳幹アトラスは、脳の最も未知な領域の一つについて、これまでにない詳細な地図を科学者に提供する。

articles.title: Watch: Typhoon Bavi forecast to bring heavy rains and floods to Taiwan, Japan and China
articles.description: See how the powerful storm is expected to move across east Asia on Saturday.
articles.titleJa: 視聴：台風バヴィ、台湾、日本、中国に豪雨と洪水を予測
articles.summary: 強力な台風バヴィが土曜日に東アジアを横断し、台湾、日本、中国に豪雨と洪水をもたらすと予測されている。

articles.title: Fertilizer trade impacted by Strait of Hormuz conflict
articles.description: Trade in urea and phosphate fertilizers has been severely disrupted by the conflict in the Persian Gulf, according to data analysed by the WTO Secretariat. Certain economies in Africa and Asia are particularly vulnerable to resulting fertilizer shortages and price hikes. Opening of the Strait of Hormuz – a key channel for fertilizer trade - will in due course contribute to easing trade frictions and restore stability to global markets.
articles.titleJa: ホルムズ海峡紛争が肥料貿易に影響
articles.summary: WTO事務局の分析によると、ホルムズ海峡紛争により尿素・リン酸肥料の貿易が大きく混乱。アフリカやアジアの一部経済が不足や価格高騰に脆弱であり、海峡の開通が市場安定に貢献すると期待されている。

articles.title: WTO members explore path forward on agricultural negotiations
articles.description: WTO members shared their views on the state of agricultural negotiations and discussed how best to move talks forward on 9 July at the WTO Committee on Agriculture in Special Session in Geneva. It was the first meeting of the WTO's agricultural negotiating body since the 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14) in Cameroon earlier this year, at which WTO members were unable to reach a consensus outcome on agriculture.
articles.titleJa: WTO加盟国、農業交渉の今後の道筋を模索
articles.summary: WTO加盟国は7月9日、ジュネーブで農業交渉の現状と今後の進め方について議論した。これは、今年初めのカメルーンでの第14回閣僚会議で農業に関する合意が得られなかった後、初の交渉会合となる。

articles.title: Bhutan resumes negotiations to join the WTO after 18-year hiatus
articles.description: At the 5th meeting of the Working Party on the Accession of Bhutan held on 9 July, WTO members welcomed the country back to the negotiating table after 18 years. Bhutan reaffirmed its strong commitment to joining the WTO, while highlighting the positive economic developments achieved since 2008.
articles.titleJa: ブータン、18年の休止を経てWTO加盟交渉を再開
articles.summary: 7月9日に開催されたブータン加盟作業部会の第5回会合で、WTO加盟国は18年ぶりに交渉の場に戻ったブータンを歓迎。ブータンは加盟への強いコミットメントを再確認し、2008年以降の経済発展を強調した。

articles.title: DG Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala welcomes President Kavelashvili of Georgia to the WTO
articles.description: WTO Director-General Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala welcomed the President of Georgia, Mikheil Kavelashvili, to the WTO on 8 July to discuss Georgia's economic and trade performance, its engagement in the multilateral trading system, and current developments in the global trading environment.
articles.titleJa: ンゴジ・オコンジョ＝イウェアラ事務局長、ジョージアのカベラシビリ大統領をWTOに歓迎
articles.summary: WTO事務局長は7月8日、ジョージア大統領を迎え、同国の経済・貿易実績、多角的貿易システムへの関与、および世界の貿易環境における現在の動向について議論した。

articles.title: WTO panel issues report regarding EU duties on imports of fatty acid from Indonesia
articles.description: On 8 July, the WTO circulated the panel report in the case brought by Indonesia in European Union – Anti-Dumping Measures on Imports of Fatty Acid from Indonesia (DS622).
articles.titleJa: WTOパネル、インドネシア産脂肪酸輸入に対するEUの関税に関する報告書を発行
articles.summary: 7月8日、WTOはインドネシアが提訴した「欧州連合 — インドネシア産脂肪酸輸入に対するアンチダンピング措置 (DS622)」に関するパネル報告書を配布した。

articles.title: Joint Statement by the Heads of the IEA, IMF, World Bank, and WTO
articles.description: The Heads of the International Energy Agency (IEA), International Monetary Fund (IMF), World Bank Group (WBG), and World Trade Organization (WTO) met on July 7 as part of the high-level coordination group established in April to maximize their institutions’ response to the energy, trade, and economic impact of the war in the Middle East. Following the meeting, they issued the statement below:
articles.titleJa: IEA、IMF、世界銀行、WTOのトップによる共同声明
articles.summary: IEA、IMF、世界銀行グループ、WTOのトップは、中東戦争によるエネルギー、貿易、経済への影響に対応するため、4月に設立された高官級連携グループの一環として7月7日に会合を開催し、共同声明を発表した。

articles.title: Rules Negotiating Group Chair reports on fisheries subsidies negotiations, next steps
articles.description: At a meeting of the Negotiating Group on Rules held on 8 July, the Chair, Ambassador Leslie Ramsammy of Guyana, reported on WTO members' active participation and constructive engagement in three information and thematic sessions on fisheries subsidies negotiations held since the 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14). He announced his intention to organize three Fish Weeks by the end of 2026, during which members will report on progress made in the negotiations and exchange views in thematic sessions.
articles.titleJa: 規則交渉グループ議長、漁業補助金交渉と次のステップについて報告
articles.summary: 規則交渉グループ議長は7月8日の会合で、第14回閣僚会議以降の漁業補助金交渉の進捗を報告し、加盟国の積極的な関与を評価。2026年末までに3回の「フィッシュ・ウィーク」開催の意向を表明した。

articles.title: DPP co-sponsors identify priority areas, advance on workplan towards MC15
articles.description: At a meeting on 6 July, co-sponsors of the Dialogue on Plastics Pollution and Environmentally Sustainable Plastics Trade (DPP) focused discussions on developing a workplan for 2026-27 in preparation for the 15th WTO Ministerial Conference (MC15) with a view to continuing to deliver concrete, practical and member-driven outcomes. They identified priority areas and expressed broad support for a balanced and streamlined plan that advances substantive work while maintaining a manageable workload.
articles.titleJa: DPP共同スポンサー、優先分野を特定しMC15に向けた作業計画を進展
articles.summary: 7月6日の会合で、プラスチック汚染と環境に配慮したプラスチック貿易に関する対話（DPP）の共同スポンサーは、第15回WTO閣僚会議（MC15）に向けた2026-27年の作業計画の策定に焦点を当てた。

articles.title: Members review MC14 outcomes, discuss energy crisis responses amid Middle East conflict
articles.description: At a meeting on 7 July, WTO members participating in the Fossil Fuel Subsidy Reform (FFSR) initiative reviewed outcomes from the 14th WTO Ministerial Conference (MC14) in Cameroon and highlighted progress across key work areas since MC13. Members also examined global policy responses to energy market disruptions stemming from the conflict in the Middle East, focusing on lessons from crisis-support measures and approaches to promote the energy transition in the longer-term.
articles.titleJa: 加盟国がMC14の成果を検討、中東紛争下のエネルギー危機対応を議論
articles.summary: 7月7日の会合で、化石燃料補助金改革イニシアチブに参加するWTO加盟国は、MC14の成果をレビューし、中東紛争によるエネルギー市場混乱への世界的な政策対応を検討した。

articles.title: WTO issues new edition of “One-Page Case Summaries”
articles.description: The WTO has issued a new edition of WTO Dispute Settlement: One-Page Case Summaries, a regularly updated publication that provides succinct summaries of every panel and Appellate Body report adopted by the WTO’s Dispute Settlement Body (DSB) and every arbitration decision or award notified to the DSB up to the end of 2025. The publication also includes summaries of panel reports circulated to WTO members and published on the WTO website that have not yet been adopted by the DSB, as they remain subject to pending appeals.
articles.titleJa: WTO、「紛争解決ケース要約」新版を発行
articles.summary: WTOは、紛争解決機関によって採択された全パネル・上級委員会報告書、および2025年末までに通知された全仲裁決定・裁定を簡潔に要約した出版物「WTO紛争解決：1ページケース要約」の新版を発行した。
